item.title: Some context on the Alan Rictchson self defense incident
item.description:
The initial footage released by Ronnie Taylor's (blue shirt) family. Not-so-subtly clipped to only show part of the interaction. So here's some more context.
The vest that Alan Richardson was wearing had a body cam as well, which Taylor failed to take into account before attacking, releasing, and lying about Richardson's actions.
Taylor with what appears to be injuries from the altercation. Falsely claiming he asked politely, and even admitted to shoving Richardson, twice, before being lightly reprimanded.
Maga hat in his regular hat rotation. Make of the staged attack narrative what you will. At this time, neither party is pressing charges. Edit: spelling error in title; Ritchson
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: I can finally die a legend on an app nobody has ever heard of, let alone even knows how to pronounce.
item.description:
We did it boiz. 1,000,000+ Totally Fake Internet Points™ Thank you for all the love and support. With your help, I have most likely gained my father's approval (still waiting on his reply) You can find me and the bottom shelf memes 24/7 in the dumpster fire: discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka

item.title: When the 4th biopsy comes back negative for the first time ever and my sister officially has zero cancer cells left in her body.
item.description: Source: Truly, Madly, Deeply (1990) #intergalacticqualitygifs (Check WiFi) She has never had a biopsy come back good. Anytime we hear it, it gives us a gut punch. She has been beating the cancer for 2 months now and this was the final test to truly see if her body was fighting it off. But for the first time ever, with immunotherapy alone, it came back negative. Not a single cancer cell. Nothing. My sister, her kids, my family, my kids can start living a normal life again. I am so beyond grateful. Truly one of the best days of my life!
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Absolute bombshell. Data reveals someone made a massive 580 MILLION dollar trade on oil exactly 15 minutes BEFORE Donald Trump posted his tweet about pausing the Iran war. Someone on the inside just made a life changing fortune. The corruption is blatant.

item.title: Wish me luck
item.description:
I like my current job. But, I need more hours and they pay me a lump sum once a month which makes scheduling financial decisions hairy. Nonetheless, I am going to stick with them until I can get another job that gives me the hours and pay that will give me more independence.
I had to improvise my shoes to wear today as my dress shoes are falling apart and these are the blackest nicest shoes I have. This might be the first time I have ever worn this shoes. These are my Vans Nintendo Entertainment System shoes.
item.dc:creator: zeacorzeppelin10

item.title: GovBrief Today #418
item.description: Evidence only matters to this administration when it can be aimed at someone. The Fed Chair withstood Trump's public insults and threats to fire him, so the DOJ opened a criminal investigation into a building renovation he oversees. A newly unsealed transcript shows the government had no evidence Chairman Powell committed a crime. Eight days later, the judge quashed the subpoenas, writing the government produced "essentially zero evidence" and was "targeting a disfavored official." The Justice Department called its Epstein investigation "exhaustive." Deposition videos released Tuesday show Epstein's longtime lawyer and accountant each told the House Oversight Committee that federal investigators never interviewed them. Minnesota officials, meanwhile, are suing the federal government for refusing to share evidence from three shootings by federal agents that killed two people and wounded a third. Don't let Renée Good and Alex Pretti's killers disappear into another "exhaustive" investigation. Call your representatives. Demand that DOJ share the evidence with Minnesota authorities. We've emailed 6,700+ stories over 418 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260324-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar24 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/immunity-fda-warning [3] https://go.govbrief.today/malone-quits [4] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-lawyer-accountant [5] https://go.govbrief.today/sb-pipeline [6] https://go.govbrief.today/usda-grant-cancel [7] https://go.govbrief.today/voter-fraud-wisc [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cole-attack [9] https://go.govbrief.today/anthropic-cripple [10] https://go.govbrief.today/nm-meta [11] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-evidence [12] https://go.govbrief.today/daca-recipient-return [13] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-sworn-in [14] https://go.govbrief.today/tsa-ice-sfo [15] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-flip [16] https://go.govbrief.today/foreign-routers [17] https://go.govbrief.today/armstrong-senate [18] https://go.govbrief.today/adams-tourism [19] https://go.govbrief.today/delta-congress [20] https://go.govbrief.today/laguardia-ntsb [21] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-evidence Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Home Run!
item.description: It's crazy how effortless some dolphins make this look. Not all dolphins learn this hunting technique, and some are much better at it than others. This particular dolphin made 9 attempts and was successful 7 of those times. And each time he made contact it launched the mullet at least 25 feet through the air. The technique is called fish kicking. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, BlueSky, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe
